falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this key support level would contradict the bottom pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate extreme market participation, contradicting the low-activity conditions typically associated with a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report shows a job loss of 500,000 or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This extreme negative employment data would trigger a market downturn, invalidating the current HOLD verdict and suggesting a deeper bearish trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
